explanation: Strong ON/PN relation but weak mean-reversion evidence. The strategy preserves company-level exposure and remains close to the passive 50/50 allocation.

Company was manually included in the final fundamental portfolio even though it did not pass all hard universe filters. The policy group itself was still assigned by the standard training-sample rule engine. Weak or unclear statistical evidence. The strategy stays close to the passive 50/50 benchmark.
